creator: m@kappa.st
text:
Please delete PR ports/115829. It is a duplicate of 115828.

--
Mathias Monnerville

On Sun, Aug 26, 2007 at 11:40:38AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/glpi,
>
> Please note that PR ports/115829 has just been submitted.

> patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
